nodes.name: Fetch MLB Odds
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create a 'Query Auth' credential in n8n. Name: 'Odds API'. Set Name=apiKey, Value=<your-key>. Then select it under Credential to connect with.

nodes.name: Append to Tracking Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Select your Google Sheet and 'Tracking' sheet tab. All games (including watch_low) are appended. Bucket column stores the new 7-bucket name.

nodes.name: Send Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: Configure Telegram Bot credentials and set chatId
